sourceTitle: Koleston Perfect Fact Sheet and Usage Guidelines
sourceNote: 請以品牌官方技術手冊、產品 leaflet、教育手冊或官方色卡為準。若資料來自經銷商、部落格或非官方影片，verified 必須為 false 或 partial。
notes: Core Koleston Perfect seed rules. Special Mix, Special Blonde and Balance services may require sub-line checks.

conditions: Permanent color or level adjustment with Welloxon Perfect developer.
warnings: Special shades and regional education rules may require different timing or ratio.

conditions: Regrowth retouch using the same product system.
warnings: Avoid unnecessary overlap on porous mid-lengths and ends.

conditions: Grey coverage service where natural base support is needed.
warnings: Resistant grey hair may require brand-specific coverage education and saturation control.

conditions: High lift or Special Blonde-style work where the product line supports 1:2 mixing.
warnings: Do not apply high developer near scalp without checking current official instructions and client scalp condition.

conditions: Lengths and ends refresh or soft tonal balance.
warnings: Porous hair may grab tone quickly; visually monitor deposit.

conditions: Cool tone refinement on previously lightened or faded hair.
warnings: Do not use generic additive grams; adjust by Wella shade family and stylist judgement.

restrictions: Limited lift; not a substitute for lightening services.
Assess porous or damaged hair before use.

recommendedUse: high lift when brand instructions allow
restrictions: High risk near scalp or on compromised hair.

greyCoverageRules.note: Low grey percentage: add natural base support if needed.
Moderate grey percentage: increase natural base support.
High grey percentage: balanced natural/fashion support.
Very high grey percentage: stronger natural base support.

restrictions: Patch/sensitivity and service suitability must follow brand instructions and local regulations.
warnings: Final shade family and additives require professional confirmation against current Wella education materials.

sourceNote: 請以品牌官方技術手冊、產品 leaflet、教育手冊或官方色卡為準。若資料來自經銷商、部落格或非官方影片，verified 必須為 false 或 partial。
notes: Structure only for first version. Product generation and exact lightener variant must be confirmed.

conditions: Lightener consistency and technique vary by Blondor product.
warnings: Do not exceed official maximum processing time; check development visually.

restrictions: Slow lift; use only when product instructions allow.

recommendedUse: on-scalp maximum in many lightener contexts
restrictions: Confirm current product instructions for scalp application.
Avoid on compromised hair or near scalp unless official instructions allow.
High risk; not for compromised hair or scalp-adjacent work.
Partial data only; exact Blondor product variant must be selected before service.
warnings: The app will only show reference direction for this partial lightener seed.
